parameters.content:
## CoreClaw口碑运营 / Reputation Ops

**Purpose (EN):** Advanced reputation operations.

**用途:** 高级口碑运营.

This workflow uses the official CoreClaw node as the scraping source and combines standard n8n nodes for polling, deduplication, AI enrichment, routing, reporting, and destination payload preparation.

用途: 以CoreClaw官方节点为数据来源，并结合n8n标准节点完成轮询、去重、AI增强、分流、报告和载荷准备。

## Parameters / 参数

Edit **Input Config / 输入配置** before running.

**Example / 示例:**
`keyword=dentist, base_location=Austin, Texas, USA, fetch_reviews=true`

**Tips / 提示:**
- Start with low limits for testing.
- Increase wait_seconds for larger jobs.
- Select your CoreClaw credential on each CoreClaw node after import.
- 测试阶段建议使用较小数量.
- 大批量任务请提高wait_seconds.
- 导入后请在CoreClaw节点选择你的凭证.

## Flow / 流程

1. Trigger / 触发
2. Input Config / 输入配置
3. Start CoreClaw Run / 启动CoreClaw
4. Wait + Poll / 等待并轮询
5. Get Results / 获取结果
6. Normalize + Deduplicate / 规范化并去重
7. AI or Enrichment / AI或增强处理
8. Prepare Payloads + Report / 准备载荷并生成报告

Use **Success Summary / 成功摘要** to inspect final output.
使用 **Success Summary / 成功摘要** 查看最终输出。

## Outputs & Integrations / 输出集成

**Output (EN):** Slack/Notion/Sheets payloads for reputation follow-up.

**输出:** 生成可用于业务系统的数据载荷、摘要和执行证据.

Recommended next integrations:
- Google Sheets / Google 表格
- Airtable or CRM / Airtable 或 CRM
- Slack alerts / Slack 提醒
- Notion database / Notion 数据库
- Gmail or email outreach / Gmail 或邮件外联

nodes.name: Start CoreClaw Run / 启动CoreClaw
nodes.notes: Select your CoreClaw API credential after import.

nodes.name: Wait Before Poll / 等待轮询
Get Run Status / 获取状态
nodes.notes: Select your CoreClaw API credential after import.

nodes.name: Get Run Results / 获取结果
nodes.notes: Select your CoreClaw API credential after import.

nodes.name: AI Business Analysis / AI商业分析

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ ({ model: 'astron-code-latest', temperature: 0.2, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a B2B revenue operations analyst. Return compact JSON only.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Analyze this local business lead and return JSON with fields: persona, pain_point, pitch, next_step, risk. Lead: ' + JSON.stringify($json) }] }) }}

nodes.name: Parse AI Output / 解析AI输出
Prepare Sheets Rows / 准备表格行

parameters.jsCode: return $input.all().map(item => ({ json: { ...item.json, destination: 'google_sheets', row: { lead_key: item.json.lead_key, title: item.json.title, category: item.json.category, address: item.json.address, phone: item.json.phone, website: item.json.website, email: item.json.email || item.json.discovered_emails, rating: item.json.rating, review_count: item.json.review_count, lead_score: item.json.lead_score, lead_priority: item.json.lead_priority, recommended_action: item.json.recommended_action, ai_pitch: item.json.ai_pitch, company_summary: item.json.company_summary } } }));

nodes.name: Prepare Slack Alerts / 准备Slack提醒

parameters.jsCode: return $input.all().map(item => ({ json: { ...item.json, destination: 'slack', slack_text: '[' + item.json.lead_priority.toUpperCase() + '] ' + item.json.title + ' | Score ' + item.json.lead_score + ' | ' + item.json.recommended_action } }));

nodes.name: Prepare Notion Pages / 准备Notion页面

parameters.jsCode: return $input.all().map(item => ({ json: { ...item.json, destination: 'notion', notion_page: { title: item.json.title, properties: { Priority: item.json.lead_priority, Score: item.json.lead_score, Stage: item.json.crm_stage, Website: item.json.website } } } }));

const status = $items('Get Run Status / 获取状态')?.[0]?.json ?? {};
return [{ json: { outcome: 'failure', workflow_kind: 'reputation_advanced', run_slug: $items('Start CoreClaw Run / 启动CoreClaw')?.[0]?.json?.run_slug || '', run_status: status.status, run_error_message: status.err_msg || '', verified_at: new Date().toISOString() }}];
